title: Safety-Aware Deep Q-Network Variants for Lightweight Sensor-Based Collision Avoidance in Autonomous Vehicles
description: Software and experiment code for comparing DQN, Double DQN, and Dueling DQN variants for lightweight sensor-based autonomous vehicle collision avoidance in a structured three-lane road environment. The framework uses seven distance sensors and normalized vehicle speed as state inputs, applies safety-aware reward shaping, and evaluates robustness under unseen obstacle layouts, sensor noise, obstacle density variations, and obstacle speed variations.
